last_result.proof_state: The committed EasyCrypt proof state was not changed.

source.label: Parsed from EasyCrypt pretty goal text

navigation.confidence_reason: The current pure goal exposes relevant list/local symbols, but the goal is large or the local evidence is partial.
navigation.why_now: current ambient goal mentions list/subtype/local conversion operators that often close after unfolding the local head and supplying qualified lemma names.

preconditions: Use only when the visible goal is a pure ambient/list obligation.
Lookup any non-trivial cross-file lemma before using it if its signature is unknown.
Probe the block; if it fails, shorten to the intro/unfold prefix.
fast_track_probe.expected_next_shape: The pure list/subtype obligation closes, or the remaining goal points to one missing local lemma/unfold.

anti_routes.reason: Blind SMT often misses cloned/local qualified names.
Prefer the qualified/local name shown by lookup or lemma_hints.

repair_if_fails.next: inspect lemma_hints or lookup_symbol for the missing qualified name
try a smaller unfold/rewrite prefix before changing proof family

route_health.message: Current pure-tail obligations expose list/map/filter membership source structure whose local facts are not separated in the current context.
evidence: membership fact: hu: g ^ G1.u{hr} \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog{hr}
route_health.observed_gap: Visible membership sources carry local case facts that can expose the key, projection, or witness relation, but those source facts are not separated in the current context.

cut_position.tactic: seq 1 : (g ^ G1.u \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog /\ G1.g_ ^ G1.u' \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`2) G3.cilog /\ size G3.cilog <= PKE_.qD /\ G1.w <> zero /\ G1.g_ = g ^ G1.w) (PKE_.qD%r / (order - 1)%r) ((PKE_.qD%r / order%r) ^ 2) 1%r 0%r.

obligation_families.effect: The pure goal exposes tuple/record projections or constructor equalities that can connect program variables to map/list keys.
obligation_families.limitations: Projection equalities are reported only when visible in the current text.

obligation_families.effect: The current proof point is dominated by local logical obligations rather than program-frontier movement.
obligation_families.limitations: Quantifier names are not normalized across EasyCrypt pretty-printer variants.

membership_hypotheses: hu: g ^ G1.u{hr} \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog{hr}

visible_destructors.effect: Exposes a preimage term for a mapped membership source.
visible_destructors.limitations: The concrete preimage name depends on the local proof context.

membership_decomposition_surface.effect: Summarizes list/map/filter membership sources whose local case facts are visible in the current pure tail.
limitations: No destructor tactic is chosen by this surface.
The panel does not assume which membership branch is true.

gap_analysis.gap: Visible membership sources carry local case facts that can expose the key, projection, or witness relation, but those source facts are not separated in the current context.

It does not choose a tactic or instantiate a lemma.
